name: Simultaneous EEG–fMRI Naturalistic Viewing
description: An FCP/INDI dataset of 22 adults with simultaneous EEG and fMRI during naturalistic movie viewing, rest, and flicker tasks. A multimodal resource for studying dynamic brain activity during naturalistic social and emotional stimulation.
citation: Telesford QK, et al. (2023). An open-access dataset of naturalistic viewing using simultaneous EEG-fMRI. Scientific Data, 10, 554.
